channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 6 free LinkedIn Learning courses to help you find a new job
item.description: It’s a . . . well, weird job market out there, to put it diplomatically. If you’ve suddenly found yourself looking for work among what feels like a never-ending onslaught of layoffs, you’re not alone. Now more than ever, standing out is essential to landing your dream job.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: Why we’re ushering in a new era in pregnancy health
item.description: Lindsay Orr was active and healthy, running marathons and hiking all around Colorado. During pregnancy, she developed a persistent headache and dangerously high blood pressure—hallmark symptoms of preeclampsia, a leading cause of preterm birth as well as maternal mortality and morbidity.
item.dc:creator: Maneesh Jain, Fast Company

item.title: The 3 types of teams in the product operating model
item.description: At first glance, the shift toward product thinking may seem tailor-made for teams working on customer-facing digital products, like mobile apps or eCommerce experiences, where new features are envisioned in lockstep with business units that have P&L responsibility.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Trump Administration Cuts Funding for Cybersecurity Initiatives
item.description: Trump administration cuts funding for cybersecurity initiatives, raising concerns about election security
item.dc:creator: Christina A. Cassidy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lego Mario Kart Set Unveiled: Build Your Own Iconic Character and Kart - The Official Website
item.description: Lego has just unveiled a new Mario Kart set that lets you build Mario and the iconic 'Standard Kart' from 1,972 pieces. The set is up for preorder now ahead of a May 15, 2025, ship date.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Voice-cloning companies hit for lack of safeguards against scammers
item.description: Companies creating generative AI (genAI) tools that can clone voices are not doing enough to prevent scammers from using them to defraud customers, according to a study from Consumer Reports.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: This entire nation's public health department was found to be running on a single Excel spreadsheet
item.description: Health New Zealand has been running around 6,000 apps and 100 networks, but its finances are tracked with Excel.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft is adding image editing and compression to its Windows Share feature - and I couldn't be happier
item.description: If you're using Microsoft's Windows 11 23H2 beta, there's a new sharing feature that you might want to take note of.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft is developing its own AI models to compete with OpenAI
item.description: One of the hottest trends right now involves work on reasoning AI models — tools that can more or less arrive at the right conclusion on their own. (The best-known reasoning models at the moment are the Chinese Deepseek-R1, as well as o1 and o3-mini from OpenAI.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Streamline AI governance with AWS and IBM
item.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) has become a driving force in business, reshaping how organizations everywhere operate. As AI’s influence grows, however, so does the need for strong governance.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Another top security camera maker is seeing devices hijacked into botnet
item.description: Edimax IC-7100 camera was found vulnerable to a command injection flaw currently being used in remote code execution attacks.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: RTX 5050 rumors detail full spec of desktop graphics card, suggesting Nvidia may use slower video RAM – but I wouldn’t panic yet
item.description: Some gamers are disappointed with the rumored spec of the RTX 5050, but even if it pans out like this, I wouldn’t dismiss the GPU so readily.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Guatemala's Volcano of Fire erupts and forces evacuations
item.description: Guatemala’s Volcano of Fire is erupting, and authorities have evacuated nearly 300 families while warning that another 30,000 people in the area could be at risk.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2025: What to expect from the AI leader
item.description: No company has both driven and benefited from AI advancements more than Nvidia. Last year, Nvidia’s GTC 2024 grabbed headlines with its introduction of the Blackwell architecture and the DGX systems powered by it. With GTC 2025 right around the corner (it runs March 17- 21 in San Jose, Calif.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 4 steps to debunk the change resistance myth
item.description: Whether it’s automating process, reorganizing teams, or adapting to shifting customer needs, executives know it’s imperative that everyone embraces change to grow.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 10 things developers love about JavaScript – and 10 things they don’t
item.description: It was 30 years ago today, Sgt. JavaScript taught the web to play. Well, not exactly but close enough. The programming language began in 1995 as a project in the depths of the browser maker Netscape.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: UC teams with Bay Area tech company for new lab that hopes to make AI work for artists
item.description: Can a new initiative make peace between human creatives and the technology threatening to displace them?
item.dc:creator: Jenna Ahart, The Mercury News

item.title: They were forced to scam others worldwide. Now thousands are detained on the Myanmar border
item.description: Thousands of sick, exhausted and terrified young men and women, from countries all over the world squat in rows, packed shoulder to shoulder, surgical masks covering their mouths and, some, their eyes.
item.dc:creator: Huizhong Wu, Jintamas Saksornchai And Martha Mendoza, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: February’s IT job market in the US shows mixed signals; unemployment ticks up
item.description: “Sluggish” might be the best word to describe the IT job market after the US Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) published its data for February employment today. The data offered mixed signals for US tech jobs: even though the number of tech roles grew, unemployment rose.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Musk's SpaceX confirms Starlink lease agreement with FAA
item.description: SpaceX confirmed Wednesday that it is leasing Starlink kits and service to the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) for free but denied any push to take over Verizon’s contract to build an updated communications system for the agency.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Stop carrying your physical driver's license and add it to your Apple Wallet
item.description: A digital ID may be even more secure than a physical ID. Storing your driver's license in your Apple Wallet is an ideal solution for commuters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Alibaba says its new AI model rivals DeepSeeks’s R-1, OpenAI’s o1
item.description: Alibaba Cloud on Thursday launched QwQ-32B, a compact reasoning model built on its latest large language model (LLM), Qwen2.5-32b, one it says delivers performance comparable to other large cutting edge models, including Chinese rival DeepSeek and OpenAI’s o1, with only 32 billion parameters.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas. The U.S. is the largest market for the company. The recent investments in the Siemens' U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: AI chatbots infected with Russian disinformation: Study
item.description: The world’s most popular artificial intelligence (AI) chatbots are infected with Russian disinformation, according to a study published Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Tim Scott unveils bill targeting debanking
item.description: Senate Banking Committee Chair Tim Scott (R-S.C.) unveiled legislation Thursday taking aim at debanking.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Review: Zencoder has a vision for AI coding
item.description: Zencoder is an AI coding assistant with interfaces to Visual Studio Code and JetBrains IDEs. It is designed to help developers ship products faster, much like GitHub Copilot, Amazon Q Developer, and Tabnine.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Authorities use high tech to enhance border security
item.description: Surveillance cameras and drones give border officials an advantage; but the challenge of data-sharing silos remains.
item.dc:creator: Ali Bradley, NewsNation
